allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat(ios): Add log retrieval recipes for iPad and iPhone

Adds ios-retrieve-logs-ipad and ios-retrieve-logs-iphone recipes
using devicectl device copy from for reliable log access.

USAGE:
just ios-retrieve-logs-ipad   # Retrieve iPad logs
just ios-retrieve-logs-iphone # Retrieve iPhone logs

Copies entire Documents/logs/ directory from device to timestamped
/tmp/ios_logs_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS directory on host machine.

BENEFITS:
- More reliable than live streaming
- Preserves all timestamped log files
- Enables post-mortem analysis of test runs

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
